003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.remote;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.Constants.*;
021
022import java.lang.reflect.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
029
030/**
031 * Holds resolved metadata for a single method on an interface annotated with
032 * {@link Remote}.
033 *
034 * <p>
035 * Extracted at interface-discovery time (see {@link RrpcInterfaceMeta}) and cached for
036 * efficient proxy invocation.
037 *
038 * <p>
039 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
040 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
041 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
042 * (and possibly earlier).
043 *
044 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
045 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
046 * </ul>
047 *
048 * @since 9.2.1
049 */
050public final class RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta {
051
052   // Per-class cache of resolved part serializers, mirroring the classic
053   // RestClient.getPartSerializer(Class) per-class cache.  The next-gen client has no bean store, so resolved
054   // instances are independent of any client and safe to share statically across interfaces/methods.
055   private static final Map<Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer>, HttpPartSerializer> PART_SERIALIZERS = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
056
057   /**
058    * Resolves an {@link HttpPartSerializer} class declared on an {@link HttpPartMarshalling} annotation to a cached
059    * instance, or returns <jk>null</jk> for the {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.HttpPartSerializer.Void} sentinel (or a <jk>null</jk> class).
060    *
061    * <p>
062    * Instances are created through {@link BeanInstantiator} (bean-store-less in the next-gen engine) and cached per
063    * class.  Mirrors the classic {@code RestClient.getPartSerializer(Class)} per-class cache.
064    *
065    * @param c The part serializer class. May be <jk>null</jk>.
066    * @return The resolved (cached) part serializer, or <jk>null</jk> if none was specified.
067    */
068   public static HttpPartSerializer resolvePartSerializer(Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> c) {
069      if (c == null || c == HttpPartSerializer.Void.class)
070         return null;
071      return PART_SERIALIZERS.computeIfAbsent(c, k -> BeanInstantiator.of(k).run());
072   }
073
074   /**
075    * Method-level cross-cutting call policy: interceptors, per-call timeout, retries, and the
076    * generic {@code throwOnError} flag, sourced from {@code @RemoteOp}/verb annotation members.
077    *
078    * <p>
079    * Kept as a single carrier so the (already busy) method-meta constructor isn't flooded with scalar arguments.
080    * The {@code interceptors} are stored as raw {@code Class<?>[]} (rather than {@code Class<? extends
081    * RestCallInterceptor>[]}) because {@code RestCallInterceptor} lives in the {@code juneau-rest-client} module, which
082    * this module must not depend on; they are resolved to interceptor instances by the next-gen {@code RemoteClient}.
083    *
084    * @param interceptors The interceptor classes to apply (each must implement the client-side interceptor SPI).
085    * @param timeout The per-call response timeout as a duration string (empty = none).
086    * @param retries The max retry attempts (0 = disabled).
087    * @param retryNonIdempotent Whether to allow retrying non-idempotent verbs (POST/PATCH).
088    * @param throwOnError Whether to throw a generic exception on an unmatched error response.
089    */
090   public record Policy(Class<?>[] interceptors, String timeout, int retries, boolean retryNonIdempotent, boolean throwOnError) {
091
092      /** The empty (no-op) policy used for methods that declare none of the cross-cutting policy members. */
093      public static final Policy NONE = new Policy(new Class<?>[0], "", 0, false, false);
094
095      @Override
096      public boolean equals(Object o) {
097         if (this == o) return true;
098         if (!(o instanceof Policy other)) return false;
099         return Arrays.equals(interceptors, other.interceptors)
100            && timeout.equals(other.timeout)
101            && retries == other.retries
102            && retryNonIdempotent == other.retryNonIdempotent
103            && throwOnError == other.throwOnError;
104      }
105
106      @Override
107      public int hashCode() {
108         return Objects.hash(Arrays.hashCode(interceptors), timeout, retries, retryNonIdempotent, throwOnError);
109      }
110
111      @Override
112      public String toString() {
113         return "Policy[interceptors=" + Arrays.toString(interceptors)
114            + ", timeout=" + timeout
115            + ", retries=" + retries
116            + ", retryNonIdempotent=" + retryNonIdempotent
117            + ", throwOnError=" + throwOnError + "]";
118      }
119   }
120
121   /**
122    * Method-level content negotiation: the {@code accept} and {@code contentType} media-type
123    * overrides sourced from {@code @RemoteOp}/verb-annotation members.
124    *
125    * <p>
126    * Kept as a single carrier so the (already busy) method-meta constructor isn't flooded with scalar arguments.
127    * Both values are plain media-type strings (e.g. {@code "application/xml"}); an empty string means "not set".
128    *
129    * @param accept The {@code Accept} media type (empty = none).
130    * @param contentType The {@code Content-Type} / request-serializer media type (empty = none).
131    */
132   public record ContentNegotiation(String accept, String contentType) {
133
134      /** The empty content-negotiation carrier used for methods that declare neither member. */
135      public static final ContentNegotiation NONE = new ContentNegotiation("", "");
136   }
137
138   private final Method method;
139   private final String httpMethod;
140   private final String path;
141   private final RemoteReturn returnType;
142   // Method-level custom part serializer: from @HttpPartMarshalling(serializer=...) on the method.
143   private final HttpPartSerializer partSerializer;
144   // Method-level cross-cutting call policy.
145   private final Policy policy;
146   // Method-level content negotiation: accept + contentType media-type overrides.
147   private final ContentNegotiation neg;
148   // Method-level part defaults: a default that fills a null argument for the matching part name.
149   private final Map<String,String> headerDefaults;
150   private final Map<String,String> queryDefaults;
151   private final Map<String,String> formDataDefaults;
152   private final Map<String,String> pathDefaults;
153   // Method-level @Content(def): default/constant body applied when the body arg is null or absent.
154   private final String contentDefault;
155   // Method-level base/host override: an annotation-declared substitute for the client root URL.
156   private final String baseUrl;
157   // Index of the single @Url parameter, or -1 if the method declares none.
158   private final int urlParamIndex;
159   // Whether this method assembles a multipart/form-data body from its @Part parameters.
160   private final boolean multipart;
161   // Method-level always-applied constants: emitted on every call, no parameter required.
162   private final List<Map.Entry<String,String>> constantHeaders;
163   private final List<Map.Entry<String,String>> constantQueryData;
164   private final List<Map.Entry<String,String>> constantFormData;
165
166   RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta(Method method, String httpMethod, String path, RemoteReturn returnType) {
167      this(method, httpMethod, path, returnType, List.of(), List.of(), List.of(), "", Policy.NONE, ContentNegotiation.NONE);
168   }
169
170   @SuppressWarnings({
171      "java:S107" // The constructor mirrors the verb-annotation surface (verb/path/return + 3 constant-part lists + the baseUrl override + the cross-cutting policy carrier + the content-negotiation carrier); wider holders would add indirection without improving this internal metadata builder.
172   })
173   RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta(Method method, String httpMethod, String path, RemoteReturn returnType,
174         List<Map.Entry<String,String>> constantHeaders, List<Map.Entry<String,String>> constantQueryData,
175         List<Map.Entry<String,String>> constantFormData, String baseUrl, Policy policy, ContentNegotiation neg) {
176      this.method = method;
177      this.httpMethod = httpMethod;
178      this.path = path;
179      this.returnType = returnType;
180      this.constantHeaders = constantHeaders;
181      this.constantQueryData = constantQueryData;
182      this.constantFormData = constantFormData;
183      this.baseUrl = baseUrl;
184      this.urlParamIndex = findUrlParamIndex(method);
185      this.multipart = method.getAnnotation(Multipart.class) != null;
186      validateMultipart(method, multipart);
187      this.policy = policy;
188      this.neg = neg;
189
190      var h = method.getAnnotation(Header.class);
191      this.headerDefaults = h == null ? Map.of() : partDefault(h.name(), h.value(), h.def(), false);
192      var q = method.getAnnotation(Query.class);
193      this.queryDefaults = q == null ? Map.of() : partDefault(q.name(), q.value(), q.def(), false);
194      var f = method.getAnnotation(FormData.class);
195      this.formDataDefaults = f == null ? Map.of() : partDefault(f.name(), f.value(), f.def(), false);
196      var p = method.getAnnotation(Path.class);
197      this.pathDefaults = p == null ? Map.of() : partDefault(p.name(), p.value(), p.def(), true);
198      var c = method.getAnnotation(Content.class);
199      this.contentDefault = (c == null || c.def().isEmpty()) ? null : c.def();
200      var hpm = method.getAnnotation(HttpPartMarshalling.class);
201      this.partSerializer = hpm == null ? null : resolvePartSerializer(hpm.serializer());
202   }
203
204   /**
205    * Builds a single-entry method-level default map from a method-level part annotation.
206    *
207    * <p>
208    * The entry is keyed by the part name ({@code name()} falling back to {@code value()}).  The default is recorded
209    * only when both a name and a "set" default are present.  For {@code @Path} (where {@code def()} defaults to the
210    * {@code _NONE_} sentinel) any value other than the sentinel counts as set; for the other part types a non-empty
211    * default counts as set.
212    */
213   private static Map<String,String> partDefault(String name, String value, String def, boolean pathSemantics) {
214      var key = name.isEmpty() ? value : name;
215      var hasDef = pathSemantics ? ! NONE.equals(def) : ! def.isEmpty();
216      return (key.isEmpty() || ! hasDef) ? Map.of() : Map.of(key, def);
217   }
218
219   /**
220    * Locates the single {@link Url @Url} parameter on the method.
221    *
222    * <p>
223    * Validated at proxy-build time: at most one {@code @Url} parameter is permitted per method.
224    *
225    * @param method The method to scan.
226    * @return The zero-based index of the {@code @Url} parameter, or {@code -1} if the method declares none.
227    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If the method declares more than one {@code @Url} parameter.
228    */
229   private static int findUrlParamIndex(Method method) {
230      var params = method.getParameters();
231      var index = -1;
232      for (var i = 0; i < params.length; i++) {
233         if (params[i].getAnnotation(Url.class) != null) {
234            if (index != -1)
235               throw iaex("Method {0}.{1} declares more than one @Url parameter; at most one is allowed",
236                  method.getDeclaringClass().getName(), method.getName());
237            index = i;
238         }
239      }
240      return index;
241   }
242
243   /**
244    * Validates the multipart body-mode declaration on the method.
245    *
246    * <p>
247    * Enforces body-mode exclusivity and detects misuse at proxy-build time:
248    * <ul>
249    *    <li>A {@code @Multipart} method must declare at least one {@link Part @Part} parameter.
250    *    <li>A {@code @Multipart} method must not also declare a single {@link Content @Content}
251    *       body (parameter-level or method-level) &mdash; a method is either multipart or single-body, not both.
252    *    <li>A {@link Part @Part} parameter is only valid on a {@code @Multipart} method.
253    * </ul>
254    *
255    * @param method The method to validate.
256    * @param multipart Whether the method is annotated {@link Multipart}.
257    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If the multipart declaration is invalid.
258    */
259   private static void validateMultipart(Method method, boolean multipart) {
260      var partCount = 0;
261      var hasContentParam = method.getAnnotation(Content.class) != null;
262      for (var p : method.getParameters()) {
263         if (p.getAnnotation(Part.class) != null)
264            partCount++;
265         if (p.getAnnotation(Content.class) != null)
266            hasContentParam = true;
267      }
268      var cn = method.getDeclaringClass().getName();
269      var mn = method.getName();
270      if (multipart) {
271         if (hasContentParam)
272            throw iaex("Method {0}.{1} declares both @Multipart and @Content; a method is either multipart or single-@Content, not both", cn, mn);
273         if (partCount == 0)
274            throw iaex("Method {0}.{1} is annotated @Multipart but declares no @Part parameters", cn, mn);
275      } else if (partCount > 0) {
276         throw iaex("Method {0}.{1} declares @Part parameter(s) but is not annotated @Multipart", cn, mn);
277      }
278   }
279
280   /**
281    * Returns the Java method this metadata is for.
282    *
283    * @return The method. Never <jk>null</jk>.
284    */
285   public Method getMethod() {
286      return method;
287   }
288
289   /**
290    * Returns the Java method this metadata is for.
291    *
292    * <p>
293    * Alias for {@link #getMethod()} provided for backwards compatibility with the classic API.
294    *
295    * @return The Java method. Never <jk>null</jk>.
296    */
297   public Method getJavaMethod() {
298      return getMethod();
299   }
300
301   /**
302    * Returns the HTTP method (e.g. {@code "GET"}, {@code "POST"}).
303    *
304    * @return The HTTP method. Never <jk>null</jk>.
305    */
306   public String getHttpMethod() {
307      return httpMethod;
308   }
309
310   /**
311    * Returns the resolved path for this operation (relative to the interface base path).
312    *
313    * @return The path. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
314    */
315   public String getPath() {
316      return path;
317   }
318
319   /**
320    * Returns what the proxy method should return.
321    *
322    * @return The return type. Never <jk>null</jk>.
323    */
324   public RemoteReturn getReturnType() {
325      return returnType;
326   }
327
328   /**
329    * Returns the method-level default for a {@link Header @Header} part, or <jk>null</jk> if none.
330    *
331    * @param name The header name.
332    * @return The default value, or <jk>null</jk>.
333    */
334   public String getHeaderDefault(String name) {
335      return headerDefaults.get(name);
336   }
337
338   /**
339    * Returns the method-level default for a {@link Query @Query} part, or <jk>null</jk> if none.
340    *
341    * @param name The query parameter name.
342    * @return The default value, or <jk>null</jk>.
343    */
344   public String getQueryDefault(String name) {
345      return queryDefaults.get(name);
346   }
347
348   /**
349    * Returns the method-level default for a {@link FormData @FormData} part, or <jk>null</jk> if none.
350    *
351    * @param name The form-data parameter name.
352    * @return The default value, or <jk>null</jk>.
353    */
354   public String getFormDataDefault(String name) {
355      return formDataDefaults.get(name);
356   }
357
358   /**
359    * Returns the method-level default for a {@link Path @Path} part, or <jk>null</jk> if none.
360    *
361    * @param name The path variable name.
362    * @return The default value, or <jk>null</jk>.
363    */
364   public String getPathDefault(String name) {
365      return pathDefaults.get(name);
366   }
367
368   /**
369    * Returns the method-level {@link Content @Content} default body, or <jk>null</jk> if none.
370    *
371    * <p>
372    * Sourced from {@code @Content(def=...)} declared on the method.  Used as the body when a {@code @Content}
373    * parameter is <jk>null</jk>, or as a constant body when the method declares no {@code @Content} parameter.
374    *
375    * @return The default body value, or <jk>null</jk>.
376    */
377   public String getContentDefault() {
378      return contentDefault;
379   }
380
381   /**
382    * Returns the method-level base/host override, or an empty string if none.
383    *
384    * <p>
385    * Sourced from {@code @RemoteOp(baseUrl=...)} / the verb annotations' {@code baseUrl} (resolved through
386    * {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.VarResolver#DEFAULT}).  Takes precedence over the interface-level
387    * {@link RrpcInterfaceMeta#getBaseUrl()} but is itself overridden by an {@link Url @Url}
388    * parameter; preserves the interface base path + method path + templating.
389    *
390    * @return The base/host override. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
391    */
392   public String getBaseUrl() {
393      return baseUrl;
394   }
395
396   /**
397    * Returns the method-level {@code contentType} media-type override, or an empty string if none.
398    *
399    * <p>
400    * Sourced from {@code @RemoteOp(contentType=...)} / the verb annotations' {@code contentType}.  Selects the
401    * matching request serializer and sets the {@code Content-Type} header; takes precedence over the interface-level
402    * {@link RrpcInterfaceMeta#getContentType()}.
403    *
404    * @return The {@code contentType} media type. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
405    */
406   public String getContentType() {
407      return neg.contentType();
408   }
409
410   /**
411    * Returns the method-level {@code accept} media-type override, or an empty string if none.
412    *
413    * <p>
414    * Sourced from {@code @RemoteOp(accept=...)} / the verb annotations' {@code accept}.  Sets the {@code Accept}
415    * header and acts as the response parser fallback; takes precedence over the interface-level
416    * {@link RrpcInterfaceMeta#getAccept()}.
417    *
418    * @return The {@code accept} media type. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
419    */
420   public String getAccept() {
421      return neg.accept();
422   }
423
424   /**
425    * Returns the zero-based index of the method's single {@link Url @Url} parameter,
426    * or {@code -1} if the method declares none.
427    *
428    * <p>
429    * The presence and structural position of the {@code @Url} parameter is fixed per method (validated at proxy-build
430    * time: at most one is allowed); the per-call value is read from the invocation arguments by the next-gen
431    * {@code RemoteClient} and never cached here.
432    *
433    * @return The {@code @Url} parameter index, or {@code -1}.
434    */
435   public int getUrlParamIndex() {
436      return urlParamIndex;
437   }
438
439   /**
440    * Returns whether this method assembles a {@code multipart/form-data} request body from its
441    * {@link Part @Part} parameters.
442    *
443    * <p>
444    * Sourced from the presence of a method-level {@link Multipart @Multipart} annotation.  Validated at proxy-build
445    * time: a multipart method must declare at least one {@code @Part} parameter and must not also declare a single
446    * {@link Content @Content} body.
447    *
448    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this is a multipart method.
449    */
450   public boolean isMultipart() {
451      return multipart;
452   }
453
454   /**
455    * Returns the method-level custom {@link HttpPartSerializer}, or <jk>null</jk> if none.
456    *
457    * <p>
458    * Sourced from {@code @HttpPartMarshalling(serializer=...)} declared on the method.  Applied to a
459    * parameter's parts when the parameter itself declares no {@code @HttpPartMarshalling} serializer; the
460    * interface-level default ({@link RrpcInterfaceMeta#getPartSerializer()}) applies when neither is present.
461    *
462    * @return The resolved part serializer, or <jk>null</jk>.
463    */
464   public HttpPartSerializer getPartSerializer() {
465      return partSerializer;
466   }
467
468   /**
469    * Returns the method-level interceptor classes, or an empty array if none.
470    *
471    * <p>
472    * Each class implements the next-gen client-side interceptor SPI and is resolved to an instance by the next-gen
473    * {@code RemoteClient} (the raw {@code Class<?>[]} type avoids a module dependency on {@code juneau-rest-client}).
474    *
475    * @return The interceptor classes. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
476    */
477   public Class<?>[] getInterceptorClasses() {
478      return policy.interceptors();
479   }
480
481   /**
482    * Returns the method-level per-call timeout as a duration string, or an empty string if none.
483    *
484    * @return The timeout duration string. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
485    */
486   public String getTimeout() {
487      return policy.timeout();
488   }
489
490   /**
491    * Returns the method-level max retry attempts, or {@code 0} if retries are disabled.
492    *
493    * @return The retry count.
494    */
495   public int getRetries() {
496      return policy.retries();
497   }
498
499   /**
500    * Returns whether this method opts non-idempotent verbs (POST/PATCH) into automatic retries.
501    *
502    * @return <jk>true</jk> if non-idempotent retries are opted in at the method level.
503    */
504   public boolean isRetryNonIdempotent() {
505      return policy.retryNonIdempotent();
506   }
507
508   /**
509    * Returns whether this method throws a generic exception on an unmatched error response.
510    *
511    * @return <jk>true</jk> if {@code throwOnError} is set at the method level.
512    */
513   public boolean isThrowOnError() {
514      return policy.throwOnError();
515   }
516
517   /**
518    * Returns the method-level always-applied constant headers ({@code "Name: value"} form), resolved via
519    * {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.VarResolver#DEFAULT}.
520    *
521    * @return An unmodifiable list of name/value header entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
522    */
523   public List<Map.Entry<String,String>> getConstantHeaders() {
524      return constantHeaders;
525   }
526
527   /**
528    * Returns the method-level always-applied constant query parameters ({@code "name=value"} form), resolved via
529    * {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.VarResolver#DEFAULT}.
530    *
531    * @return An unmodifiable list of name/value query entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
532    */
533   public List<Map.Entry<String,String>> getConstantQueryData() {
534      return constantQueryData;
535   }
536
537   /**
538    * Returns the method-level always-applied constant form-data parameters ({@code "name=value"} form), resolved via
539    * {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.VarResolver#DEFAULT}.
540    *
541    * @return An unmodifiable list of name/value form-data entries. Never <jk>null</jk>, but may be empty.
542    */
543   public List<Map.Entry<String,String>> getConstantFormData() {
544      return constantFormData;
545   }
546
547   @Override /* Object */
548   public String toString() {
549      return httpMethod + " " + path + " → " + method.getName() + "()";
550   }
551}
